title: Fresh OpenClaw Install Baseline
objective: Create a disposable fresh OpenClaw home from the target runtime, start the gateway, and verify basic user-facing commands without onboarding or manual setup.

phases.title: Provision Fresh Env
phases.intent: Create a disposable OpenClaw environment with the selected runtime and minimum local config.

phases.title: Gateway Readiness
phases.intent: Confirm the gateway reaches a usable running state within the threshold.

phases.title: Plugin Baseline
phases.intent: Verify OpenClaw can inspect installed/bundled plugin state without missing runtime dependency errors.

phases.title: Model Baseline
phases.intent: Verify model discovery does not stall the gateway or hang indefinitely.

phases.title: Startup Logs
phases.intent: Capture startup logs for dependency staging, plugin loading, stalls, and warnings.

phases.title: Cleanup
phases.intent: Destroy the disposable OpenClaw environment unless retained for debugging.
